revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required: (1) Reclassify cherry_pick_moments[2] from 'knowledge_gap' to a DQ-execution moment with a secondary policy-ambiguity flag — correct the codex reference from qualifiers.credit_qualifier (knowledge gap framing) to dq_rules.credit_below_670_no_alternative + qualifiers.credit_qualifier.spencer_operator_note. (2) Revise cherry_pick_moments[3]'s codex citation — empathy_on_vulnerability_disclosure is not triggered by a stated credit score in response to a direct qualifier question; reroute to bill_anchoring / general exit quality, and soften the coaching implication language to illustrative intent rather than Ion-canonical phrasing. (3) Add one missed cherry_pick moment: the gatekeeper-to-customer transition at 01:46 where Bucky's abrupt re-entry after a 75-second hold skips a rapport re-establishment beat — classify as identity_confusion_recovery / intro_quality and note the diarization artifact. Minor: revise trajectory_verdict.shape from 'stagnant' to a label that reflects terminal DQ rather than a call that had room to move and didn't.
